name: Your Creator, Lumine
description:
["I'M YOUR MOTHER?"]

So, I had the idea that since Travler created the Manekin, they could indirectly be their parent, so I decided to make Lumine first, if you guys like this one I will make one of Aether and will probably make more genshin impact characters. Remember that you can comment if you think that I could fix something with my character or if you'd like to leave recommendations on who should be the next character, I hope you like it.

And if you're asking about the fluff and angst tags, it depends on what path you choose for your story, so yeah.
creator: Lelita
